description: Product Description Versatile Solutions for Every Surface 30pk Floor Wipes Apple Add To Basket Buzz Lemon Scented Wipes Add To Basket 200pk Buzz Bathroom Wipes Add To Basket 200pk Buzz Wipes Rhubarb Add To Basket 100pk Car Dash Wipes Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 159 4.2 out of 5 stars 102 4.3 out of 5 stars 88 4.4 out of 5 stars 93 4.3 out of 5 stars 604 Price £7.62 £ 7 . 62 £8.65 £ 8 . 65 £9.65 £ 9 . 65 £9.50 £ 9 . 50 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 Versatile Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Eliminate Dirt ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Scented ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Convenient Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Multipack ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Are these wipes suitable for all types of floors? Yes, Buzz floor wipes are designed for all floor types, including wood and laminate. They clean and lightly polish surfaces, leaving them spotless. Do the wipes dry quickly on the surface? Absolutely, Buzz floor wipes are quick-drying, ensuring your floors are clean and ready to use in no time without any streaks. How strong are the Buzz floor wipes? Buzz wipes are ultra-strong, ensuring they don't tear during use. They provide consistent, effective cleaning for all floor types. What size are the wipes, and how many are included? Each wipe is 20cm x 28cm, and the pack includes 30 extra-large wipes, ensuring you have plenty for thorough cleaning sessions. Is there anything special included with these wipes? Yes, this pack includes a reusable microfibre cleaner for your phone, perfect for keeping your screen smudge-free on the go.
